chapter_title.en: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)

text: أَمِيرُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ "قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "اَللَّهُمَّ اِرْحَمْ خُلَفَائِي" قِيلَ يَا رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ وَ مَنْ خُلَفَاؤُكَ قَالَ "اَلَّذِينَ يَأْتُونَ مِنْ بَعْدِي يَرْوُونَ حَدِيثِي وَ سُنَّتِي " ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5919 - Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as), peace be upon him, said:
The Messenger of Allah (swt), peace and blessings be upon him and his family, said:
"O' Allah (swt), have mercy on my successors."
It was asked: "O' Messenger of Allah (swt), who are your successors?"
Prophet (sw) replied: "Those who come after me and narrate my traditions and my Sunnah."
